# GIGO UI — Full Reference

> @gigo-ui/components v1.0.1
> A Svelte 5 component library of intentionally terrible UI patterns.
> Every component is production-quality code implementing the worst UX ideas imaginable.
> Built with Svelte 5 runes, TypeScript 5, Tailwind CSS 4.

---

## Installation

```bash
pnpm add @gigo-ui/components
# or: npm install @gigo-ui/components
# or: yarn add @gigo-ui/components
```

### Required: Import Global Styles

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import '@gigo-ui/components/globals.css';
</script>
```

The stylesheet includes Tailwind v4 directives and @source scanning. Utility classes used inside components are generated in consumer builds.

### Theme Customization

Override CSS variables after importing:

```css
@import "@gigo-ui/components/globals.css";

:root {
  --primary: #2563eb;
  --background: #ffffff;
  --foreground: #111827;
}
```

---

## Component Reference

### Category: BadUI Collection

Components that technically work, but make you wish they didn't.

---

#### GhostCard

A card that randomly vanishes and reappears in a glitched state.

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { GhostCard } from '@gigo-ui/components';
</script>

<GhostCard title="Important Info" description="This content may vanish at any moment." />
```

Props:
- title (string, default: 'Ghost Card') — Card heading text
- description (string, default: '') — Card body text
- class (string, default: '') — Additional CSS classes
- disappearMinMs (number, default: 2000) — Minimum time before disappearing (ms)
- disappearMaxMs (number, default: 5000) — Maximum time before disappearing (ms)
- glitchChance (number, default: 0.6) — Probability of glitch on reappear (0-1)

---

#### GravityInput

Characters fall with gravity as you type.

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { GravityInput } from '@gigo-ui/components';
  let value = $state('');
</script>

<GravityInput bind:value placeholder="Type something..." />
```

Props:
- value (string, default: '', bindable) — Current input value
- placeholder (string, default: '') — Placeholder text
- class (string, default: '') — Additional CSS classes

---

#### RotaryDial

Rotary phone dial for number input. Drag to dial digits.

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { RotaryDial } from '@gigo-ui/components';
  let number = $state('');
</script>

<RotaryDial bind:value={number} maxDigits={10} />
```

Props:
- value (string, default: '', bindable) — Dialed number string
- maxDigits (number, default: 10) — Maximum digits allowed
- class (string, default: '') — Additional CSS classes

---

#### SliderPhone

Enter phone numbers using a single slider.

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { SliderPhone } from '@gigo-ui/components';
  let phone = $state('');
</script>

<SliderPhone bind:value={phone} digitCount={10} />
```

Props:
- value (string, default: '', bindable) — Current phone number
- digitCount (number, default: 10) — Number of digits to enter
- class (string, default: '') — Additional CSS classes

---

#### CatchSubmit

Submit button that physically runs from your cursor.

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { CatchSubmit } from '@gigo-ui/components';
</script>

<CatchSubmit label="Submit Form" onsubmit={() => console.log('Caught!')} />
```

Props:
- label (string, default: 'Submit') — Button label text
- onsubmit (() => void, optional) — Fires when user catches and clicks the button
- class (string, default: '') — Additional CSS classes

---

#### DropdownCalc

Basic arithmetic using dropdown menus.

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { DropdownCalc } from '@gigo-ui/components';
  let result = $state('');
</script>

<DropdownCalc bind:value={result} />
```

Props:
- value (string, default: '', bindable) — Calculation result
- class (string, default: '') — Additional CSS classes

---

#### PasswordPeekhole

Tiny draggable circle to view masked password characters.

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { PasswordPeekhole } from '@gigo-ui/components';
  let pw = $state('');
</script>

<PasswordPeekhole bind:value={pw} placeholder="Enter password..." />
```

Props:
- value (string, default: '', bindable) — Password value
- placeholder (string, default: '') — Placeholder text
- class (string, default: '') — Additional CSS classes

---

#### VolumeSlider

Deliberately confusing volume control.

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { VolumeSlider } from '@gigo-ui/components';
  let vol = $state(50);
</script>

<VolumeSlider bind:value={vol} />
```

Props:
- value (number, default: 50, bindable) — Volume level
- min (number, default: 0) — Minimum value
- max (number, default: 100) — Maximum value
- step (number, default: 1) — Step increment
- invertDirection (boolean, default: false) — Invert slider direction
- jumpAround (boolean, default: false) — Random value jumps
- fakeLabels (boolean, default: false) — Show misleading labels
- class (string, default: '') — Additional CSS classes

---

#### ProgressDoom

Progress bar that regresses and lies about completion.

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { ProgressDoom } from '@gigo-ui/components';
</script>

<ProgressDoom targetMs={8000} onComplete={() => alert('Done!')} />
```

Props:
- targetMs (number, default: 5000) — Target completion time in ms
- goBackwards (boolean, default: false) — Progress regresses
- stall (boolean, default: false) — Progress stalls randomly
- lieAboutCompletion (boolean, default: false) — Fake 100% then restart
- onComplete (() => void, optional) — Fires on genuine completion
- class (string, default: '') — Additional CSS classes

---

#### ColorPickerWrong

A color picker that deliberately picks the wrong color.

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { ColorPickerWrong } from '@gigo-ui/components';
  let color = $state('#e040fb');
</script>

<ColorPickerWrong bind:value={color} />
```

Props:
- value (string, default: '#e040fb', bindable) — Selected color
- offsetHue (boolean, default: false) — Shift hue from selection
- swapChannels (boolean, default: false) — Swap RGB channels
- delayUpdate (boolean, default: false) — Delayed color updates
- class (string, default: '') — Additional CSS classes

---

#### TermsSidescroll

Terms of service presented in a horizontal scroller.

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { TermsSidescroll } from '@gigo-ui/components';
  let accepted = $state(false);
</script>

<TermsSidescroll bind:accepted />
```

Props:
- content (string, optional) — Terms text content
- accepted (boolean, default: false, bindable) — Acceptance state
- rotateText (boolean, default: false) — Rotate text randomly
- scrambleOnScroll (boolean, default: false) — Scramble text while scrolling
- sidewaysScroll (boolean, default: false) — Force horizontal scrolling
- class (string, default: '') — Additional CSS classes

---

#### CookieMonster

Dark pattern cookie consent banner from everyone's nightmares.

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { CookieMonster } from '@gigo-ui/components';
  let showCookies = $state(true);
</script>

<CookieMonster
  bind:visible={showCookies}
  onaccept={() => console.log('Accepted')}
  onreject={() => console.log('Rejected')}
/>
```

Props:
- visible (boolean, default: true, bindable) — Controls banner visibility
- onaccept (() => void, optional) — Fires when user accepts (or is tricked)
- onreject (() => void, optional) — Fires if user manages to reject
- class (string, default: '') — Additional CSS classes

Features:
- Giant pulsing "Accept All" button
- Microscopic reject button that flees from cursor
- Fake ✕ button that actually accepts cookies
- Banner grows larger with each dismissal attempt
- Shame-based decline copy that escalates

---

#### NotificationStorm

Hydra-style toast notifications that multiply when dismissed.

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { NotificationStorm } from '@gigo-ui/components';
</script>

<NotificationStorm autoStart maxVisible={6} />
```

Props:
- autoStart (boolean, default: true) — Auto-spawn initial notifications
- maxVisible (number, default: 8) — Maximum visible toasts
- class (string, default: '') — Additional CSS classes

Features:
- Every dismissed toast spawns 2 replacements
- "Mark All Read" generates 10 more
- Absurd messages with color-coded severity
- Real-time stats tracking dismissed vs spawned

---

#### CaptchaFromHell

Multi-stage impossible CAPTCHA verification.

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { CaptchaFromHell } from '@gigo-ui/components';
</script>

<CaptchaFromHell onverify={() => console.log('Verified')} />
```

Props:
- onverify (() => void, optional) — Fires when user passes (unlikely)
- class (string, default: '') — Additional CSS classes

Features:
- Stage 1: Select images containing "existential dread"
- Stage 2: Solve unsolvable math (0÷0, P=NP?)
- Stage 3: Slider with moving target and time pressure
- Skip button appears after 4 failed attempts

---

### Category: Classic Chaos

Standard UI elements enhanced with destruction overlays and chaos physics.

---

#### GigoCompactor

Voxel-crushes UI into 3D physics debris using Three.js + Rapier3D WASM.

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { GigoCompactor } from '@gigo-ui/components';
  let compactor: GigoCompactor;
</script>

<GigoCompactor bind:this={compactor} cols={20} rows={20} intensity={8}>
  <div class="card">This will be voxelized</div>
</GigoCompactor>

<button onclick={() => compactor.crush()}>Crush</button>
<button onclick={() => compactor.restore()}>Restore</button>
```

Props:
- isGarbage (boolean, default: false) — Trigger the crush
- cols (number, default: 20) — Voxel grid columns
- rows (number, default: 20) — Voxel grid rows
- intensity (number, default: 7) — Crush force 0-10
- debugMode (boolean, default: false) — Show bounding box
- class (string, default: '') — Additional CSS classes
- children (Snippet, required) — Slot content to wrap and destroy

Methods:
- crush() — Trigger the voxel crush
- restore() — Reset to original state

---

#### ShatterPane

Voronoi glass fracture with 2D physics simulation.

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { ShatterPane } from '@gigo-ui/components';
  let pane: ShatterPane;
</script>

<ShatterPane bind:this={pane} shardCount={64} intensity={8}>
  <div class="card">Fragile content</div>
</ShatterPane>

<button onclick={() => pane.shatter()}>Shatter</button>
<button onclick={() => pane.restore()}>Restore</button>
```

Props:
- isShattered (boolean, default: false) — Trigger the shatter
- shardCount (number, default: 32) — Number of glass shards
- intensity (number, default: 7) — Shatter force
- tint (string, optional) — Shard tint color
- debugMode (boolean, default: false) — Show debug info
- class (string, default: '') — Additional CSS classes

Methods:
- shatter() — Trigger the glass fracture
- restore() — Reset to original state

---

#### PixelDissolve

Per-pixel dissolution in spreading contagion waves.

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { PixelDissolve } from '@gigo-ui/components';
  let dissolve: PixelDissolve;
</script>

<PixelDissolve bind:this={dissolve} resolution={2} waveSeed={12}>
  <div class="card">Half the universe</div>
</PixelDissolve>

<button onclick={() => dissolve.dissolve()}>Snap</button>
```

Props:
- isDead (boolean, default: false) — Trigger dissolution
- resolution (number, default: 4) — Pixel block size
- waveSeed (number, default: 0) — Wave pattern seed
- intensity (number, default: 7) — Dissolution force
- debugMode (boolean, default: false) — Show debug info
- class (string, default: '') — Additional CSS classes

Methods:
- dissolve() — Trigger pixel dissolution
- restore() — Reset to original state

---

#### BlackHoleSink

Gravitational singularity with accretion disk effect.

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { BlackHoleSink } from '@gigo-ui/components';
  let hole: BlackHoleSink;
</script>

<BlackHoleSink bind:this={hole} intensity={8} glowColor="rgba(255,140,0,0.8)">
  <div class="card">Event Horizon</div>
</BlackHoleSink>

<button onclick={() => hole.consume()}>Consume</button>
```

Props:
- isConsumed (boolean, default: false) — Trigger consumption
- resolution (number, default: 4) — Render resolution
- intensity (number, default: 7) — Gravitational force
- glowColor (string, optional) — Accretion glow color
- debugMode (boolean, default: false) — Show debug info
- class (string, default: '') — Additional CSS classes

Methods:
- consume() — Trigger black hole consumption
- restore() — Reset to original state

---

#### ChaosButton

Button with random chaos effects — CSS transforms, color shifts, text changes.

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { ChaosButton } from '@gigo-ui/components';
</script>

<ChaosButton label="Try to Click Me" onclick={() => alert('Caught!')} />
```

Props:
- label (string, default: 'Click Me') — Button label
- onclick (MouseEventHandler, optional) — Click handler
- class (string, default: '') — Additional CSS classes

---

#### ChaosForm

Form that actively fights user input.

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { ChaosForm } from '@gigo-ui/components';
</script>

<ChaosForm onsubmit={(data) => console.log(data)} />
```

Props:
- onsubmit ((data: Record<string, string>) => void, optional) — Submit handler
- class (string, default: '') — Additional CSS classes

---

### Category: Standard UI

Well-built base components with optional chaos toggles.

---

#### Button

Standard button with variants and optional chaos mode.

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { Button } from '@gigo-ui/components';
</script>

<Button variant="default" size="md">Click Me</Button>
<Button variant="chaos-nightmare" chaos multiClickRequired={5}>Multi-Click</Button>
```

Props:
- variant ('default' | 'destructive' | 'outline' | 'secondary' | 'ghost' | 'link' | 'chaos-primary' | 'chaos-destructive' | 'chaos-nightmare')
- size ('xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl' | 'chaos-sm' | 'chaos-lg' | 'chaos-xl')
- disabled (boolean) — Disabled state
- loading (boolean) — Loading state
- chaos (boolean) — Enable chaos mode
- escapeOnHover (boolean) — Button moves on hover
- randomizeText (boolean) — Randomize button text
- multiClickRequired (number) — Clicks needed to trigger

---

#### Input

Text input with optional chaos features.

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { Input } from '@gigo-ui/components';
  let val = $state('');
</script>

<Input bind:value={val} placeholder="Normal input..." />
<Input chaos randomDelete fakeValidation placeholder="Chaos input..." />
```

Props:
- type ('text' | 'email' | 'password' | 'number' | 'tel' | 'url' | 'search')
- value (string, bindable) — Input value
- placeholder (string) — Placeholder text
- chaos (boolean) — Enable chaos mode
- randomDelete (boolean) — Randomly delete characters
- fakeValidation (boolean) — Show fake validation errors
- escapeOnFocus (boolean) — Input moves when focused
- randomizeType (boolean) — Input type changes randomly

---

#### Modal

Dialog overlay with chaos behaviors.

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { Modal, Button } from '@gigo-ui/components';
  let open = $state(false);
</script>

<Button onclick={() => open = true}>Open Modal</Button>
<Modal bind:open title="Dialog" chaos resistClose escapeModal>
  {#snippet children()}
    <p>Try closing this.</p>
  {/snippet}
</Modal>
```

Props:
- open (boolean, bindable) — Visibility state
- title (string) — Modal title
- chaos (boolean) — Enable chaos mode
- resistClose (boolean) — Resist close attempts
- escapeModal (boolean) — Modal moves away from close
- fakeCloseButtons (boolean) — Add fake close buttons
- spawnMoreModals (boolean) — Closing spawns new modals

---

#### Card

Content card with 3D tilt and optional chaos rotation.

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { Card } from '@gigo-ui/components';
</script>

<Card title="My Card" description="Card description">
  {#snippet children()}
    <p>Card content</p>
  {/snippet}
</Card>
```

Props:
- title (string) — Card heading
- description (string) — Card description
- chaos (boolean) — Enable chaos mode
- randomRotation (boolean) — Random rotation
- resistClicks (boolean) — Resist click interactions
- zIndexWar (boolean) — Chaotic z-index changes

---

#### Carousel

Image carousel with chaos features.

Props:
- slides (CarouselSlide[]) — Array of { id, content, image? }
- autoplay (boolean) — Enable autoplay
- interval (number) — Autoplay interval ms
- chaos (boolean) — Enable chaos
- lyingNavigation (boolean) — Navigation lies about direction
- reverseDirection (boolean) — Reverse slide direction
- randomJumps (boolean) — Random slide jumps

---

#### Form

Form container with chaos features.

Props:
- fields (FormField[]) — Array of { id, label, type, placeholder?, required? }
- submitLabel (string) — Submit button text
- chaos (boolean) — Enable chaos mode
- randomReset (boolean) — Randomly reset form data
- fakeValidation (boolean) — Show fake validation errors
- alwaysFails (boolean) — Submission always fails
- shuffleFields (boolean) — Shuffle field order

---

#### Navigation

Navigation component with misdirection.

Props:
- items (NavItem[]) — Array of { id, label, href, icon? }
- chaos (boolean) — Enable chaos mode
- wrongDestinations (boolean) — Links go to wrong pages
- randomReorder (boolean) — Randomly reorder navigation
- fakeLoading (boolean) — Show fake loading states

---

## Utility Functions

```typescript
import { cn, chaosClasses, chaosRandom, chaosPickOne, randomGarbageText } from '@gigo-ui/components';
```

### cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]): string
Merges CSS class names using clsx + tailwind-merge. Resolves Tailwind class conflicts.

### chaosClasses(level: number): string
Generates chaos CSS classes based on intensity level (0-10):
- Level 2+: Random chaos colors
- Level 4+: Random transforms (rotate, skew, scale)
- Level 6+: Random animations (jitter, wiggle, shake, glitch)
- Level 8+: Chaos font
- Level 10: Nightmare mode (full chaos)

### chaosRandom(max: number): number
Returns random integer from 0 to max-1.

### chaosPickOne<T>(items: T[]): T
Returns a random element from an array.

### randomGarbageText(): string
Returns a random garbage string from: ERROR, undefined, NaN, 404, null, ???, LOADING..., no., HELP, bruh, :(, segfault, lol, oops, yeet, 💀

---

## CSS Classes & Design Tokens

### Brand Colors (Tailwind classes)
- text-gigo-magenta / bg-gigo-magenta (#e040fb)
- text-gigo-lime / bg-gigo-lime (#76ff03)
- text-gigo-cyan / bg-gigo-cyan (#18ffff)
- text-gigo-yellow / bg-gigo-yellow (#ffea00)
- text-gigo-orange / bg-gigo-orange (#ff6e40)
- text-gigo-pink / bg-gigo-pink (#ff4081)
- text-gigo-hotpink / bg-gigo-hotpink (#ff69b4)
- text-gigo-red / bg-gigo-red (#ff1744)
- text-gigo-blue / bg-gigo-blue (#2979ff)
- text-gigo-tomato / bg-gigo-tomato (#ff6347)

### Utility CSS Classes
- .gigo-gradient-border — Animated conic gradient border
- .gigo-glass — Glassmorphism panel
- .gigo-gradient-text — Animated gradient text
- .gigo-neon-text — Neon glow text shadow
- .gigo-spotlight — Mouse-following spotlight effect
- .gigo-ripple — Click ripple effect
- .gigo-shimmer — Shimmer loading effect
- .gigo-scanlines — CRT scanline overlay
- .gigo-mesh-bg — Mesh gradient background
- .gigo-divider — Gradient section divider
- .gigo-dot — Floating dot decoration

### Animation Classes
- animate-gigo-jitter — Rapid position jitter
- animate-gigo-wiggle — Rotation wiggle
- animate-gigo-flash — Opacity flash
- animate-gigo-shake — Horizontal shake
- animate-gigo-glitch — Position + hue-rotate glitch
- animate-gigo-chaos — Scale + rotate + hue chaos
- animate-gigo-nightmare — Full nightmare transforms
- animate-gigo-teleport — Random teleportation
- animate-gigo-drunk — Drunk swaying motion
- animate-gigo-float — Gentle float up/down
- animate-gigo-pulse-glow — Opacity pulse glow
- animate-gigo-gradient — Background gradient shift
- animate-gigo-shimmer — Horizontal shimmer sweep
- animate-gigo-entrance — Fade-in-up entrance

---

## Surface Elevation Scale (CSS Variables)

Dark mode (default):
- --surface-0: #07070d
- --surface-1: #0e0e16
- --surface-2: #14141e
- --surface-3: #1a1a28
- --border: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.07)

---

## Requirements

- Svelte 5.0+
- SvelteKit 2.0+
- Tailwind CSS 4.0+
- TypeScript 5.0+
- Node.js 20+
